creator: matt@gsicomp.on.ca
text:
David,

I could not reproduce the problem, mainly because the report program (attachment) was incomplete.  More details on how you ran the test program and the contents of your database may be required.

Please report this upstream at https://github.com/lifelines/lifelines/issues and provide:
* the missing include file from the report program ("d_year.llf")
* instructions on how you ran the report program
* a GEDCOM export of the database, if possible

Matt
